feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Recommended approach for Fiori Adapt UI in S/4H On-Premise system (Customizing client) with no data
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

For a client's S/4HANA greenfield implementation with Private Cloud (RISE with SAP), there are two clients in the Development system i.e. Customizing client (400) and Test Client (410). The client has decided not to allow any (test) data creation in client 400 but only in test client 410 (this approach seems standard in many projects).

To implement Fiori Adapt-UI enhancements and test Key-User Extensibility, we need those UI screens where we want to implement changes. For example, to change something on a Product (detail) screen, we need to navigate from the Products list in the Manage Product Master Data Fiori app. But without any data, this navigation is not possible.

The question is, what is the best or recommended to work on such Enhancements? Should we allow such Enhancements in the Test client which means also the possibility of creating a Transport Request where such enhancements could be locked for further systems?

Had anyone been in a similar system environment and what kind of approach was used there?

SAP Fiori Launchpad SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition @Jocelyn_Dart @MioYasutake

entry.title: Brownfield Project (ECC to Rise with SAP - S/4HANA Private Cloud)
entry.content:
Hello,

In a conversion project (brownfield), we are considering migrating from ECC to S/4HANA private cloud with Rise with SAP. However, we do not want to move the variant configuration structure in the existing systems to the new private cloud. Instead, we will build the MRP structure. Is it possible to transform by excluding the master data structure (variant), what are the risks? What are your comments on how we should proceed?

Thanks for your comments!

RISE with SAP SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

entry.title: In this custom logic " YY1_LGC_PO_AGENT_DET " It says "BPidentificationNumber" is an unknown column
entry.content:
In this custom logic " YY1_LGC_PO_AGENT_DET " CDS Entity I_BUSINESSUSER is deprecated and we replaced with CDS Entity I_BUSINESSUSERBASIC . But  in this custom logic we applied "WHERE BPIdentificationNumber" operation and it says "BPIdentificationNumber is an unknown column"


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Purchase requisition mandatory for few PO document type
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have a requirement to generate purchase orders (POs) for specific document types exclusively with reference to a purchase requisition.

Therefore, we've created a new screen layout for these document types, designating the purchase requisition field as a required entry, and assigned this layout to the relevant document type. However, we've encountered an issue where the system permits the creation of POs without entering data into the purchase requisition field, despite it being designated as mandatory.

Q.1) How is it possible for the system to proceed without requiring entry into a field that has been set as mandatory?

Q.2) Could you kindly suggest an alternative solution to enforce the mandatory requirement of a purchase requisition for select PO document types?

 

Thanks,

Sabarinathan K

entry.title: PO Quantity check control in MIRO while posting Customs duty invoice
entry.content:
Dear Team,

In case of Import procurement process , we are not using GR based IV Indicator in the PO. Also we need to perform MIRO for Customs duty prior to GR.

Hence users need to manually enter the quantity/value while posting Customs duty invoice during MIRO. But system allows us to enter more than the PO-Quantity to post Customs duty invoice which is not acceptable.

1. How to restrict quantity variance in MIRO line item with respect to quantities of PO item?

2. Is there any tolerance variance key which checks quantity of the PO?

For example,

If the import PO quantity is 100 KG, the system should not permit the entry of a greater quantity than stated in the PO during the posting of the Customs duty invoice in MIRO. This ensures adherence to the specified PO quantity.

Thanks,

Sabarinathan K

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - IP Query
entry.content: IP Address on the S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition related query, How do we know the Customer is providing us the Private or Public IP address for Provisioning.

entry.title: Fuzzy Search in cds query
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is it possible to use fuzzy searches (*, %, ?, etc.) in the input parameters of Analysis using CDS View as the data source?

Now I get an error saying pattern selection is not supported.
If possible, please let me know how to implement it.

Best Regards,

entry.title: WWI servers in RISE
entry.content:
Hello support,

We need the service WWI (Windows Workprocesor Integration) to generate documents in EHS, is there any availability to install it on RISE servers, or only is it possible to install it on OnPremise servers?

Thanks and regards,

entry.title: FUE calculation for Z objects - Rise With SAP
entry.content:
Hi,

We are discussing with our potential client about developing a Fiori app to create records on Z objects, these records will be created by individual SAP users. These specific users, just assigned to a role with Z object record rights and not able to reach standard SAP t-codes.

When we tried to simulate this situation on a starter system with running "SLIM_USER_CLF_HELP" program, we couldn't get any exact match with FUE classifcation like advanced,core or self-service.

The question is how can we consider these users to match with FUE classification?

entry.title: HANA - FB70 - Are there any workarounds other than complex posting for posting third-party entries?
entry.content:
Dear All,

We need to post a journal entry from Customer A to Customer A + special GL indicator, without clearing any previous invoices.

In S/4HANA, I know only "complex posting" through App FB70.

It's an old-fashioned app and the posting with FB01 mask is not as user-friendly as new fiori screens.

Do we have any more features in Fiori now ?

Thank you.

Best regards

Julien

entry.title: Commodity code + country of origin + region of origin on the invoice form for order-related invoices
entry.content:
Dear community,

We have the problem in the sales order processing process with 100% customer down payment that the commodity code + country of origin + region of origin of the articles are not printed on the invoice form in the final invoice. We have activated the data for printing in the form itself.
As far as we know, in the “new” International Trade, the “foreign trade data” is mainly transferred from the outbound delivery to the invoice.
According to our external consultants, however, an order-related billing document is required for the process, which means that we cannot reference the copy control to the outbound delivery. We have also tried to redetermine the foreign trade data in the copy control from sales document to billing document via the customizing field “Determine foreign trade”. However, without success.

Now the question to the community. Does anyone also know this problem and possibly know a solution?

System
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2020 06 (05/2023)

Thank you very much for your help.

entry.title: What is the Better way for developing Reports in SAP S/4 Hana private Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

We are working on SAP S/4 Hana Private Edition implementation, it would be grateful  if you could suggest what is the better way for developing Reports in Private Edition?

Whether we need to develop in ALV Reports in SE38 or any other feasible way for developing in Private edition?

Thanks in Advance,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to Develop Adobe Forms in SAP S/4 Private Edition like Public Edition through Binding Fields?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

Is it feasible to develop Adobe forms in SAP S/4 Hana Private Edition through Binding Fields(XML) similar to how we do in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition?

It would be grateful if you could help me with steps needs to be followed for development of Adobe Forms in Private Edition.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Is it possible to set Contractual User Type ID while provisioning users from IAS?
entry.content: We are trying to set Contractual User Type ID field while provisioning users from IAS. Is it possible? We could not manage to find any properties for this field in target system configuration.

entry.title: How to develop customized reports in in SAP S4HANA Private Edition?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

How to develop Customized Reports in SAP S4HANA Private Edition?

It would be grateful if you could help me with steps to develop customized reports.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Integrate SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud to SAP Signavio Process Insights
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We want to connect our SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud systems (RISE subscription) to SAP Signavio Process Insights but currently we don't have active SAP BTP subscription , Could you please let us know if we can integrate in any other way possible ?

Thanks in Adavance

Subasri

entry.title: The installation of SAP products failed with 5 error(s)
entry.content:
Hi Expert

An error occurred during the installation of SAP.

 


Below is the content of the log file

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?xml-stylesheet type="text/xsl" href="SapSetupError.xsl"?>
<SapSetup Context="ErrorLog">
<ErrorList>
<Error>
<Description>Registration failed.<p/></Description>
<ErrorCode>0x80004005</ErrorCode>
<Dest>C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP\FrontEnd\SapGui\GridView.ocx</Dest>
<Source>C:\Users\tanaka\AppData\Local\Temp\Sap8F24.tmp\SapGui\GridView.ocx</Source>
<State>Install</State>
<Type>File</Type>
</Error>
<Error>
<Description>Registration failed.<p/></Description>
<ErrorCode>0x80004005</ErrorCode>
<Dest>C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP\FrontEnd\SapGui\sapcalen.ocx</Dest>
<Source>C:\Users\tanaka\AppData\Local\Temp\Sap8F24.tmp\SapGui\sapcalen.ocx</Source>
<State>Install</State>
<Type>File</Type>
</Error>
<Error>
<Description>Component $CoreGUI Files is in error. It has not been successfully installed.<p/></Description>
<ErrorCode>0x80004005</ErrorCode>
<Dest/>
<Source>{4FA50AAA-25C2-4829-B605-D2F2E0FD0401}</Source>
<State>Install</State>
<Type>Component</Type>
</Error>
<Error>
<Description>Registration failed.<p/></Description>
<ErrorCode>0x80004005</ErrorCode>
<Dest>C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP\FrontEnd\SapGui\apogrid.ocx</Dest>
<Source>C:\Users\tanaka\AppData\Local\Temp\Sap8F24.tmp\SapGui\apogrid.ocx</Source>
<State>Install</State>
<Type>File</Type>
</Error>
<Error>
<Description>Component $SCM is in error. It has not been successfully installed.<p/></Description>
<ErrorCode>0x80004005</ErrorCode>
<Dest/>
<Source>{23B2DA68-7F1B-4ECC-BAE8-84C9B361C27F}</Source>
<State>Install</State>
<Type>Component</Type>
</Error>
</ErrorList>
<Time>10:34:36</Time>
<Date>25.04.2024</Date>
<UserName>tanaka</UserName>
<ComputerName>50500-TANAKA</ComputerName>
</SapSetup>

What is the problem?
Please tell us.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: What are the advantages of Rise with SAP Private cloud edition
entry.content:
Hi All, 

What are the advantages of Rise with SAP Private cloud edition over S/4hana on Premise system hosted in cloud ?

Regards

entry.title: Create two or more quotations for 1 in-house repair object
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm configuring S4/HANA Service In-House Repair Process.

My client would like to have the process as follows:

  1. Create REPA with Objects
  2. Create Repair Quotation for Object X
  3. Create another Repair Quotation for Object X
  4. Process with Repair Order form the second quotation.

Is this possible and if yes, how do you configure this?

Today I have to process from quotation to the order. Also, when I reject the quotation, the process is done. I would like to have as many quotations as possible, and then continue to the order.

The business solution is very simple: when e.g. the car is broken, we create seperate quotation for the client, and separate quotation for the purpose of insurer with different pricing. I must have both in the system.

entry.title: Change default repair process types REPO REPA REPQ
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to change default repair process types, eg REPO for ZREO etc.

I did the configuration according to instructions:

  1. Defined new process type (copied REPO) in CRMC_PROC_TYPE
  2. Defined items for new process
  3. Set REPO as inactive in CRMC_PROC_TYPE-PROCESS_BLOCKED = X
  4. Set copying REPA -> ZREO in CRMC_PR_COPY_MA

And it's not working.

Do you know how to change it?
